allow: Bash(sqlite3 data/mistakes.db "SELECT id, substr\(question_text, 1, 300\) FROM mistakes LIMIT 3;")
Bash(sed -i "s/alert\('请选择图片文件'\);/showToast\('请选择图片文件', 'error'\);/g" upload.html classic_upload.html)
Bash(sed -i "s/alert\('请选择年级'\);/showToast\('请选择年级', 'error'\);/g" upload.html classic_upload.html)
Bash(sed -i "s/alert\('请选择图片'\);/showToast\('请选择图片', 'error'\);/g" upload.html classic_upload.html)
Bash(sed -i "s/alert\('上传失败: ' + \(result\\.error || '未知错误'\)\);/showToast\('上传失败: ' + \(result.error || '未知错误'\), 'error'\);/g" upload.html classic_upload.html)
Bash(sed -i "s/alert\('上传失败: ' + error\\.message\);/showToast\('上传失败: ' + error.message, 'error'\);/g" upload.html classic_upload.html)
Bash(sed -i "s/alert\('批量上传失败: ' + \(result\\.error || '未知错误'\)\);/showToast\('批量上传失败: ' + \(result.error || '未知错误'\), 'error'\);/g" upload.html classic_upload.html)
Bash(sed -i "s/alert\('批量上传失败: ' + error\\.message\);/showToast\('批量上传失败: ' + error.message, 'error'\);/g" upload.html classic_upload.html)
